text: v Choose the settings you want for this folder. When you click OK or Apply on the Properties dialog, you will be asked if you want the changes to affect all subfolders and files as well. Archive and Index attributes (") Folder is ready for archiving (2 Allow files in this folder to have contents indexed in addition to file properties Compress or Encrypt attributes () Compress contents to save disk space 8 Encrypt contents to secure data Details oK Cancel
